AllEnrichedDescription: All contacts with a LinkedIn profile have already been enriched.
EnrichingDescription: Scraping the latest data from LinkedIn. This may take a few moments...
ErrorDescription: Failed to enrich the contact from LinkedIn.
ExtensionNotRespondingDescription: The Bondery extension did not respond in time. Make sure it is enabled and try again.
ExtensionRequiredMessage: The Bondery Chrome Extension is needed to enrich contacts from LinkedIn. Install it from the Chrome Web Store to continue.
NoLinkedInHandle: This contact has no LinkedIn username set. Add a LinkedIn profile first.
NotAuthenticatedMessage: Please open the Bondery Chrome Extension and sign in first, then try again.
PausingDescription: Enrichment will stop once the current contact finishes.
SuccessDescription: The contact was updated with the latest LinkedIn data.
